title: Heap Allocation Contracts and Failure Handling · Pointer Forensics
summary: An incident responder inherits a corrupted allocation wrapper with explicit outcomes, the earliest failing input, and two plausible hypotheses; they must preserve first-failure evidence, repair the cause, and add a regression. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in allocation wrapper with explicit outcomes and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defe…
objectives: Apply malloc and calloc size, initialization, alignment, zero-size, and failure contracts without dereferencing assumptions.
Propagate allocation failure without partial-state leaks, null dereferences, or impossible-error assumptions.
Choose and test a project policy for zero elements rather than depending on an implementation-specific returned pointer.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Malloc Calloc Contracts
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug native-systems team handles memory case 1952. Produce bounded C evidence to handle allocation failure and zero-size policy explicitly; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Apply malloc and calloc size, initialization, alignment, zero-size, and failure contracts without dereferencing assumptions.

C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Adopt C23 free_sized and free_aligned_sized only behind exact size, alignment, availability, and fallback contracts.

For Publish the incident record · Debug Sized Free C23, challenge the documented misconception with changed-size, failure-injection, printed invariant, compiler, sanitizer, analyzer, fuzz, ABI, concurrency, or production-transfer evidence: Supplying an approximate size to a sized deallocation is an optimization-only mistake.
